format_notes: Mobile-first, 9:16 vertical. All text in bottom 40% of frame (thumb-safe). No text in top-left (timestamp zone).

scenes.description: HOOK — Bold title card, black bg, white text
scenes.visuals: Black screen, white text flies in. Caption flash every 2 seconds.

scenes.description: REVEAL OPENER — AI footage of tiny bicycle
scenes.visuals: AI-generated: Extreme macro shot of tiny bicycle on palm. Sunlight, real-world setting.
scenes.jump_cut: Cut every 2s — switch between wide palm shot and close-up bike
scenes.zoom_instruction: Start wide (palm with tiny bike), zoom into chain/wheels at 00:08

scenes.visuals: Side-by-side: tiny bike next to smartphone. Then close-up of Sergey riding.
scenes.jump_cut: Cut every 2.5s. Phone comparison at 00:18, rider at 00:21.
scenes.zoom_instruction: Zoom IN on 8.4cm text (caption scale 1.3x matches visual zoom)

scenes.description: REVEAL CLIMAX — Riding in Moscow traffic
scenes.visuals: Sergey riding through Moscow streets. Wide traffic shot. Close-up feet on pedals.
scenes.jump_cut: Cut every 2s. Alternate: traffic wide → feet close-up → face → traffic
scenes.zoom_instruction: Zoom OUT for traffic wide shot, ZOOM IN for feet close-up
scenes.music: Peak energy — full beat drop at 00:38 'IN. REAL. TRAFFIC.'

scenes.visuals: Screen split: 8.4cm bike | 5.3cm bike. Or text-only reveal.
scenes.jump_cut: Single cut — split screen appears at 00:38
scenes.zoom_instruction: No zoom — let the numbers speak

scenes.visuals: Final title card: yellow/black. Then fade to outro card with 🔥 emoji.

track_1.notes: Royalty-free from YouTube Audio Library or Pixabay
